creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
As koobs@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Synopsis: [patch] add vendor patchset to devel/avr-libc
> 
> Responsible-Changed-From-To: joerg->freebsd-ports-bugs
> Responsible-Changed-By: koobs
> Responsible-Changed-When: Sat Mar 30 03:58:57 UTC 2013
> Responsible-Changed-Why: 
> maintainer timeout, unassign by submitter request; if you're still
> working on this just let me know
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=174559

Please do *not* apply this patchset (I've already told the
submitter).  The way to go is not that Atmel creates their
own fork of the opensource tools by establishing vendor
patchsets, but rather that they submit their changes and
additions back to the opensource avr-libc project.
-- 
cheers, Joerg               .-.-.   --... ...--   -.. .  DL8DTL

http://www.sax.de/~joerg/
Never trust an operating system you don't have sources for. ;-)
